final:
module reg_4bit(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [3:0] d,
    output reg [3:0] q);
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};


    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (load) begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end
endmodule
